introSection:
Snow Drift is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built in-house by the Mellors Group currently operating at Fantasy Island in Ingoldmells, Lincolnshire, England. It opened on 3 August 2025.

The coaster is also believed to have an extended layout identical to Spinning Coaster XXL however this is currently unused.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: This roller coaster can be identified by having blue track and white supports.

fullText:
Snow Drift is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built in-house by the Mellors Group currently operating at Fantasy Island in Ingoldmells, Lincolnshire, England. It opened on 3 August 2025.

The coaster is also believed to have an extended layout identical to Spinning Coaster XXL however this is currently unused.



This roller coaster can be identified by having blue track and white supports.
